overview: The Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) Program, under the Department of Business Administration, prepares students for management and administrative career in business, industry, banking, and non-government organizations. The goal of the program is to produce quality graduates who are competent enough to meet the contemporary and emerging needs of society and business enterprises, and provide the nation with knowledgeable and skilled managers who are able to meet the challenging needs of the Business environment today and days to come.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Play quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec
